items.title: AI scams in crypto approach breaking point – OpenAI’s new image model shows why they could get worse
items.whyYouShouldCare: The rise of AI scams could undermine trust in crypto platforms, impacting Solana's ecosystem and user engagement if security measures are not enhanced.

items.title: Running out of time on Clarity: State of Crypto
items.whyYouShouldCare: The urgency surrounding regulatory clarity could influence Solana's positioning and operational strategies as the ecosystem adapts to potential legal frameworks.

items.title: Aave raises nearly 80% of the $200 million it needs to cover bad debt left by Kelp DAO exploit
items.whyYouShouldCare: Aave's struggle with bad debt highlights systemic risks in DeFi, which could affect liquidity and investor confidence across platforms, including Solana.
